low.label: Tangible book value per share anchor

source.locator: Key metrics: TBVPS $97.06

low.label: Through-cycle normalized RoTCE after transformation and credit costs
low.rationale: Base assumes Services and US Personal Banking sustain mid-cycle returns as transformation expense fades; low uses trough 2023-2024 cycle; high requires sustained double-digit RoTCE.

low.label: Required return on tangible common equity
low.rationale: Global systemically important bank equity hurdle; not the stance gate.

low.label: Years of excess (or deficient) return capitalization
low.rationale: Finite duration; terminal reverts toward cost of equity.

low.label: Firmwide bridge calibration pending segment capital allocation disclosure
low.rationale: Reconciles firmwide excess-return PV to bounded legacy component range until segment RoTCE tables are reproducible from filings.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Scenario range includes delay and failure outcomes.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is an explicit analyst judgment pending base-rate and milestone reconciliation.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining capital and financing are deducted in the stated option range.

method_route.label: Credit, funding, and normalized financial returns
failure_modes: industrial EV multiple applied to a financial balance sheet
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

blockers: distributable_capital: Reconcile regulatory minimums, management buffers, stress losses, transformation costs, and the timing of actual capital return.
segment_rotce_normalization: Reconcile segment tangible capital, through-cycle credit costs, expenses, taxes, and normalized RoTCE.

falsifiers: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.
Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.
Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.
Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
cohort_purpose: Tangible capital, normalized RoTCE, credit loss, regulation, and capital return.
